task: unsupervised representation learning on large-scale bipartite graphs
input: large-scale bipartite graph (two types of nodes, e.g., users and items)
backbone: Bipartite Graph Convolutional Network (BGCN) with cascaded architecture
key_idea: use BGCN encoder with adversarial training and cascaded multi-hop aggregation for scalable unsupervised bipartite representation learning
datasets: multiple datasets of varying scales (not named in abstract)
